briefs.tldr: **Night-builder #2 shipped.** [BedRock PR #1](https://github.com/Taylorblue123/BedRock/pull/1) — Astro site bolted onto your existing repo, preserving privacy. ⚠️ **Correction:** first draft propagated a CVPR 2026 claim from your old portfolio — you flagged as fake, agent removed it everywhere in the PR.
